name: IGAWorks
description: Korean mobile advertising and data platform; parent company of Adbrix MMP serving 13,000+ apps.

seo.title: IGAWorks — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: IGAWorks: Korean mobile advertising and data platform; parent company of Adbrix MMP serving 13,000+ apps.

when_to_use: Mobile attribution and analytics for Korean app ecosystem via Adbrix SDK
Mobile ad targeting and data platform for Korean brands and performance marketers
One-SDK solution for attribution, analytics, and monetization in Korea
Measuring multi-channel Korean mobile app user acquisition performance

pros: Established Korean ad and data platform at scale
Serves thousands of Korean apps via Adbrix MMP
Deep carrier and local network integrations
cons: Most useful as a parent brand, product is Adbrix
review.verdict: Strong regional player via Adbrix, but as a brand entry it duplicates the Adbrix listing for most buyers.
review.best_for: Korean app businesses wanting a full local ad and data platform under one vendor.
review.not_for: Non-Korean apps that will use Adbrix directly rather than the parent brand.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
